position: Intern Software Engineer - Work From Home

raw_text:
Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd
Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd, (DMS) is a pioneering IT Company in Sri Lanka, now in its 49th year of business operations. While partnering the world's leading IT Co’s, DMS specializes in Systems Integration and Customized Software Solutions for Sri Lankan and overseas markets
DMS is an equal opportunity employer that provides the excitement of working with the world's leading IT brands, Financial solutions and learning from experienced managers and professionals in the IT industry.
DMS represents the World's leading American IT Co's IBM, HP, Oracle, Microsoft, Diebold Nixdorf, Entrust - Datacard, Cisco and VMWare and has been the first to implement many cutting-edge technology solutions in Sri Lanka for over 48 years.
The following vacancies currently exist in the Banking and Financial Systems Strategic Business Unit (SBU) of DMS.
Vacancy: Engineers for Entrust Systems (Males)
Applicants should be under 26 years of age and have a degree in Electronics / Mechatronics Engineering.
Selected candidates will be Maintaining Entrust Card Personalization Solutions installed at Banks and Commercial establishments.
Successful candidates who perform to the Company's expectations have a career path with promotional prospects to Senior Customer Engineers, Team Leaders and Group Managers.
Candidates living in the Greater Colombo area are preferred.
Benefits:
Attractive remuneration packages based on qualifications and experience.
Comprehensive medical insurance upon confirmation.
How to Apply:
Email your CV along with the names and addresses of two referees to
careers@dmslanka2.com
. Please specify the position you are applying for in the subject line of the email.

Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd
Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd, (DMS) is a pioneering IT Company in Sri Lanka, now in its 49th year of business operations. While partnering the world’s leading IT Co’s, DMS specializes in Systems Integration and Customized Software Solutions for Sri Lankan and overseas markets
DMS provides the excitement of working with the world’s leading IT brands, Financial solutions and learning from experienced managers and professionals in the IT industry.
DMS represents the World’s leading American IT Co’s IBM, HP, Oracle, Microsoft, Diebold Nixdorf, Entrust-Datacard, Cisco and VMWare and has been the first to implement many cutting-edge technology solutions in Sri Lanka for over 48 years.
The following vacancy currently exists in the Banking and Financial Systems Strategic Business Unit (SBU) of DMS.
Vacancy:
Software Engineer (Male)
Applicants should be under 28 years of age and possess a Computer Science / Software degree from a recognized University / Institute and have a desire to pursue a career in Software Development and Support.
Candidates for these positions should have:
Working knowledge in C#, .NET Framework, Web Forms, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3 and PostgreSQL.
A willingness to learn new things, and have the ability to Understand Programming Logic.
Strong ability to reverse engineer code and the ability to read and understand code written by others.
A good grasp of OOP design concepts and functional programming concepts.
Ability to suggest innovative ideas and find solutions to problems on their own.
Have the ability to interpret new SDK references and documentation.
Experience in using Linux and Microsoft Windows servers, drivers, their functions etc.
If selected for an interview, applicants should be able to Demonstrate All Above Listed Capabilities with Examples from academic & internship or work related projects completed.
Job Profile Includes the following: -
Customer requirement gathering.
Planning, Design and Implementation of software applications, including UI design and writing code according to given specifications.
Working as part of a team, which may be established for a specific project.
Preparing documentation for developed programs.
Testing sample data-sets to check that the program works as intended.
Other general IT related tasks.
Benefits:
Attractive remuneration packages based on qualifications and experience.
Comprehensive medical insurance upon confirmation.
How to Apply:
Email your CV along with the names and addresses of two referees to
careers@dmslanka2.com
. Please specify the position you are applying for in the subject line of the email.

position: Engineering Service Executives for Matara and Tangalle areas (Male)
files: 1474205_Engineering Service Executives for Matara and Tangalle areas _Male__content.txt
1474205_Engineering Service Executives for Matara and Tangalle areas _Male__screenshot.png
raw_text:
Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd
Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd, (DMS) is a pioneering IT Company in Sri Lanka, now in its 49
th
year of operations. DMS represents the world’s leading IT brands and specializes in Systems Integration and Customized Software Solutions for Sri Lankan and overseas markets.
DMS provides the excitement of working with the world’s leading IT brands, financial solutions and learning from the most experienced managers and professionals in the IT industry.
DMS represents Diebold Nixdorf Inc. USA, the world leader in CRMs (Cash Recycling Machines) and ATMs (Automated Teller Machines) and while having implemented the following pioneering Projects, DMS is the market leader supporting an installed base of over 2000 CRMs and ATMs in Sri Lanka and the Maldives.
Introduced ATMs to the Maldives in 1999
First CRMs in Sri Lanka and in the Maldives
First Branch and Networked Bulk Cash Depositors in Asia Pacific.
First Envelope-less Cash Acceptance ATMs in Asia Pacific.
First Envelope-less Bulk Cheque Deposit ATMs in Asia Pacific.
First Networked Foreign Currency Conversion ATMs which accept foreign currency and dispense Sri Lanka Currency and Coins.
The following vacancies now exist for candidates living in and around Matara and Tangalle areas to provide field service and support for ATMs and Cash Recyclers in this area.
Engineering Service Executives for Matara and Tangalle areas (Male)
Career opportunities exist for disciplined, motivated, self-reliant persons in Field Engineering Services who possess a positive attitude and can work under minimum supervision after initial training.
Candidates should: -
Be under 27 years of age.
Have as a minimum a National Diploma in Engineering Sciences (NDES) or HNDE or NDT or similar qualification in Electronics Engineering or Mechatronics Engineering from a recognized institution.
Have knowledge of PC hardware and Windows software.
Selected candidates will be required to service and maintain ATMs & Cash Recyclers installed at various banks in the Matara and Tangalle areas.
Candidates should reside in the Matara or Tangalle Town or in close proximity and have a motorcycle or scooter together with the relevant riding license.
Successful candidates who perform to the Company's expectations have a career path with promotional prospects to Senior ATM Service Engineers, Team Leaders, Group Managers, Department Managers and beyond.
GENERAL
• The above position includes a negotiable salary.
Please E-mail your CV stating names and addresses of two referees to
careers@dmslanka2.com
. Indicate the post applied for as the Subject of your E-mail.

SriLankan Airlines
Metrologist
Vacancy Description
SriLankan Airlines Ltd, the national carrier of Sri Lanka operates with a network of destinations throughout Asia, the Middle East, Europe and Australia. The airlines has a strong presence in Maldives and Southern India. SriLankan is a member of the oneworld alliance.
The incumbent is responsible to execute assigned operational functions of the calibration laboratory of SriLankan Engineering by fulfilling the regulatory and organizational requirements and executing its functions in an efficient and timely manner to the satisfaction of its internal/external customers and to take over the assigned responsibilities in the absence of Senior Metrologist.
Job Accountabilities
To implement, design calibration systems, procedures, and methods according to Calibration Laboratory Manager’s requirements to extend laboratory’s scope of accreditation
To implement, review and validate software used in calibration laboratory processes to ensure minimum turnaround time and improved accuracy of calibration results
To execute internal and external quality assurance plans to meet regulatory and organizational requirements
Conduct technical and quality audits of the laboratory to verify the traceability of measurement results and compliance with published standards and guidelines to ensure that the laboratory processes are in line with the regulatory and organizational requirements
Maintain existing calibration systems and procedures based on the principles of measurement science, technical analysis of measurement problems and precision requirements.
Periodic review of documents and records required for efficient execution of laboratory functions.
Requirements
Bachelor of Engineering (1) in Aircraft/Aerospace/Mechanical/Mechatronics/ Electrical and/or Electronic) or Bachelor of Science in Physical/Applied Sciences with two years of relevant post qualifying experience.
OR
Full professional qualification equivalent to NVQ level 7(2)  in the field of aircraft/Aerospace/Mechanical/Mechatronics/ Electrical and/or Electronic), with three years of relevant post-qualifying experience.
Note:
1. Qualification shall be awarded through an educational institute recognized by the University Grants Commission of Sri Lanka.
2. Qualification shall be awarded through an educational institute recognized by the Tertiary and Vocational Education Commission of Sri Lanka.
Age to be not more than
50 years
as at
07th March 2026
which is the closing date.
Be a SriLankan Citizen.
Employment will be offered on fixed term contract.
Influencing will be a reflection of unsuitability.
We are an equal opportunity Organization.
Please note that we will correspond with you within a month of closing the advertisement in the event your application is shortlisted for consideration.
Category - Airline - Aviation
Start date - 02/25/2026
End date - 03/07/2026

position: Software Engineer | Senior Software Engineer (Data Migration & Integration)
files: 1472478_Software Engineer _ Senior Software Engineer _Data Migration _ Integration__ad.png

raw_text:
Key responsibilities
Adhere to all GMP and compliance requirements in the department.
Ensure all subordinates always follow EHS requirements.
Effectively allocate labour for production and exceed daily production targets based on the weekly packing schedule.
Meet department KPIs.
Provide necessary training to staff.
Ensure effective and efficient use of dMERPS, Viva, Ariba, EHS One, and CMMS.
Ability to implement in lean manufacturing practices
Excellence in data analyzing and report generating including preparation of PPT’s
Qualifications and skills
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in Pharmaceutical science, Science, Manufacturing, Industrial Engineering, or a related field.
Experience:
Minimum 2 years of experience in production or manufacturing operations.
Hands-on experience with Lean Manufacturing, Six Sigma, or other continuous improvement methodologies.
Technical Skills:
Strong knowledge in pharmaceutical regulations and documentation, process optimization, and quality control systems.
Familiarity with ERP systems (e.g., SAP, Oracle) and manufacturing software tools.
Understanding of safety standards and compliance requirements.
Soft Skills:
Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
Strong communication and team collaboration abilities.
Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
Certifications (Preferred):
Lean Six Sigma Yellow belt/ Green Belt or higher.
ISO 9001 Quality Management certification
NVQ Level 05 06 or above
Possession of a valid Pharmacist License approved by the Medical Council.
